spec_surface.name: REPRESENTS_TERMINAL_DISCHARGE_COMPATIBILITY
spec_surface.statement: forall w nf, terminal_unrestricted(w) -> selected_domain(nf) -> terminal_T(nf) -> represents_terminal(nf,w) -> discharge_semantics_selected(nf) = discharge_semantics_unrestricted(w)
spec_surface.role: defines the precise condition under which represents_terminal(nf,w) preserves discharge semantics

weakest_missing_object.name: REPRESENTS_TERMINAL_DISCHARGE_COMPATIBILITY_PROOF
weakest_missing_object.statement: prove that the repository's represents_terminal relation satisfies REPRESENTS_TERMINAL_DISCHARGE_COMPATIBILITY
weakest_missing_object.role: upgrades the conditional spec surface into the nonconditional semantic invariance bridge
